status: EXPLORATION — candidates, not blessed. Human picks a direction, then it gets rendered clean + blessed into goldens.
reference: _ref-michael-liked.png (the mascot Michael liked; AITX open-arms mark personified)
character_dna: MASCOT CHARACTER: a chunky, rounded orange humanoid figure that is the AITX 'open arms' emblem brought to life — a round head with a big warm smile and two simple dot eyes, short rounded arms, stubby legs, solid AITX orange (#ff4201) with a slightly darker orange outline. Keep it the SAME character as the reference image (same friendly proportions and open-arms vibe). Warm, wholesome AI-builder-community energy. Isolate the single character on a clean cream paper-white background (#fbf5ec) with generous margin — do NOT include the cropped comic panel, background people, or any text from the reference.

variations.v1-hero-welcome: front-facing open-arms welcome + floating heart, comic style
variations.v3-builder-laptop: builder at work with laptop + idea-spark, comic style
variations.v4-community-huddle: three mascots group huddle, community moment
variations.v6-flat-vector: clean flat minimal vector / app-icon version

gen2_correction.note: v1 was wrong: solid single-blob body. Correction (Gary, 2026-07-19): the AITX mark body is SPLIT into two mirrored halves + separate round head. Regenerated faithful to real logo geometry.

variations.g2-faithful-clean: flat clean solid-orange, cute face, true to logo
variations.g2-dimensional: subtle soft 3D depth, split kept obvious
variations.g2-comic-inked: warm hand-drawn comic style, correct split body

gen3_michael-liked-direction.note: Direction Michael loved (2nd ref): joyful cartoon character (closed ^_^ eyes, raised welcoming arms, heart) with the AITX split-mark as the LOWER body/legs. Warmer/more expressive than the stiff-logo gen2. Comic-inked.
